title: BEM-868 read context next
objective:
Run script:
"""
ctx = Path('governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md')
text = ctx.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') if ctx.exists() else ''
# Make a compact marker with key lines only.
lines = text.splitlines()
interesting = []
for line in lines:
    low = line.lower()
    if any(tok in low for tok in ['актив', 'active', 'next', 'следующ', 'bem-867', 'bem-868', 'status:', 'completed', 'pending', 'blocked']):
        interesting.append(line)
interesting = interesting[-80:]
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM868_AGENT_CONTEXT_NEXT_READ.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-868 AGENT_CONTEXT next read\nStatus: READ\nContext exists: ' + str(ctx.exists()) + '\n\nKey lines:\n' + '\n'.join(interesting) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('read AGENT_CONTEXT key lines after BEM867/BEM868')
"""
No issue comments.
